name: Rising Tide

abilities.name: Undertow
abilities.text: When this model declares an attack, it may remove a friendly Scheme marker within 2" to have the target suffer a El. This model may drain a (s) when using this ability to remove an enemy Scheme marker within 2" instead.

actions.name: Swept Away
actions.effects: For each raise this attack receives, move the target up to 2". Then, this model may be placed into base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: The symbol 'El' in the Undertow ability appears to be a special symbol that may represent damage or an effect type, but its exact meaning is unclear from this card alone.
The (s) symbol appears to represent a resource drain or cost (possibly soulstones or another token type).
